document.title: Search & Matching Extension Catalog — Heritage Gold → LAWIM_V2
document.description: Complete machine-readable catalog of all search and matching extensions from Heritage Gold → LAWIM_V2, including Match entity, 5 scoring dimensions, 4 compatibility levels, 9 matching roles, boost/penalty rules, rematching engine, progressive search expansion, continuous market surveillance, market tension index, dossier and property health scores, constraint system, transaction blockers, and failed matching diagnostics

extensions.current_limitation: No matching engine exists in V2 — properties listed, users search/contact manually
extensions.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_ENGINE — Implement Match entity with full attributes, composite scoring algorithm, boost/penalty rules with caps, rematching engine with trigger events, minimum score 60/100, top 10 max results

attributes.name: is_proposed
attributes.description: Whether match has been proposed to demandeur

attributes.name: rematch_count
attributes.description: Number of rematches for this pair

attributes.name: match_pool
attributes.description: Which search pool this match belongs to

extensions.decision_question: Matching algorithm design: rule-based (Gold) or ML-enhanced

extensions.current_limitation: No scoring dimensions exist in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_ENGINE — Implement 5 scoring dimensions with configurable weights per property type: Geographic (0.25), Budget (0.20), Property (0.20), Behavioral (0.15), Document/Trust (0.10), Transaction Success (0.10). Include sub-dimension scoring algorithm, per-dimension score normalization, composite score calculation formula
extensions.score_calculation: For each dimension d: raw_score_d = compute_dimension_score(d), weighted_score_d = raw_score_d × weight_d. composite_raw = SUM(weighted_score_d). composite_final = CLAMP(composite_raw + total_boost - total_penalty, 0, 100). compatibility_level = classify(composite_final)
extensions.decision_question: Scoring dimension weights: Gold defaults or tunable per property type

extensions.current_limitation: No geographic scoring in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_ENGINE — Implement geographic scoring with 5 proximity tiers (L1: same neighborhood=100, L2: same city diff neighborhood=75, L3: same region diff city=50, L4: same country diff region=25, L5: different country=0). Support 3 mobility modes (low: 5km steep decay, medium: 20km gradual decay, high: 50km+ shallow decay). Zone preference bonuses. Geographic expansion steps for progressive search.

extensions.current_limitation: No compatibility level classification in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: CONFIGURE_EXISTING — Implement compatibility level thresholds and display logic: Excellent (85-100) auto-propose, Good (70-84) propose with note, Average (60-69) conditional propose, Low (<60) not proposed. Add color-coded badges and score breakdown display per level.

compatibility_levels.label: Excellent
compatibility_levels.display: Best Match badge, score breakdown, immediate proposal

compatibility_levels.label: Average
compatibility_levels.display: Average Match, proposed only if no better options

compatibility_levels.label: Low
compatibility_levels.display: Below Threshold, hidden from default view

extensions.decision_question: Compatibility level thresholds (score ranges per level)

extensions.current_limitation: No rematching concept in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_ENGINE — Implement automatic rematching on 9 trigger events (demandeur refusal, holder refusal, visit no-show, holder no-show, negotiation failure, match expiry, new listing, dossier update, holder silence). Max 3 rematch cycles per dossier. Exclusion rules for refused properties. Failed matching diagnostic on max cycles reached.

rematching_triggers.name: Visit fails (no-show)
rematching_triggers.action: Offer reschedule or new property match

extensions.rematching_flow: 1. Trigger event detected. 2. Check rematch_count < max_rematches (default 3). 3. If yes: exclude current property, set rematch_reason, increment rematch_count, recalculate scores, propose next best. 4. If no: mark project matching_status=failed, generate diagnostic, notify agent.
extensions.decision_question: Rematching trigger events and exclusion rules

extensions.current_limitation: No exclusion logic in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: CONFIGURE_EXISTING — Implement hard constraint system (budget disjoint, type mismatch, country mismatch, transaction type mismatch, availability blocked, holder blacklisted) as binary pass/fail filters. Soft constraints (partial overlap, subtype mismatch, neighborhood mismatch, missing features) as weighted score reductions. Ranking preferences (6 tie-breakers) for equal-score ordering. 6 exclusion rules (previously refused, holder refusal, active negotiation, rematch max, property suspended, demandeur blacklisted). Verification-only fields that inform but do not score.

hard_constraints.name: Property type mismatch
hard_constraints.condition: demandeur.type ≠ property.type AND no family match

extensions.current_limitation: No transaction success prediction in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_ENGINE — Implement transaction success score based on 5 factors: historical conversion rate (0-40), intent strength (0-20), holder reliability (0-20), property market demand (0-10), agent involvement (0-10). Implement transaction blocker registry with 10 blockers (trust level, verification, documents, consent, agent assignment, payment, identity, price mismatch, legal hold) each with resolution path and responsible party.

transaction_success_factors.source: Past match-to-transaction conversion rate for similar profiles
Based on past holder behavior and completion rate
Agent-pro subscription = 10, standard agent = 5, no agent = 0

extensions.decision_question: Transaction success score: statistical model or heuristic

extensions.current_limitation: No market intelligence in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_ENGINE — Implement Market Tension Index (MTI = active_dossiers / active_properties) stratified by property type, city/zone, and price range. 5 tension levels (Oversupply < 0.5, Balanced 0.5-1.0, Tension 1.0-2.0, High Tension 2.0-5.0, Critical >= 5.0). MTI impacts matching strategy: score thresholds, max proposals, proposal speed adjust per tension level.

extensions.current_limitation: No dossier health scoring in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_ENGINE — Implement Dossier Health Score (DHS) = completeness(0.50) + data_quality(0.30) + freshness(0.20). 4 health levels: Excellent (85-100) full matching, Good (70-84) matching with suggestions, Average (50-69) limited matching, Poor (<50) matching blocked. Score displayed as readiness indicator on dossier dashboard.

extensions.current_limitation: No property health scoring in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_ENGINE — Implement Property Health Score (PHS) = completeness(0.40) + quality(0.30) + freshness(0.20) + verification(0.10). 4 health levels mirroring DHS. Score influences match priority and listing visibility. Properties with PHS < 50 get reduced match visibility.

extensions.current_limitation: No matching role concept in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: CONFIGURE_EXISTING — Define 9 matching roles (demandeur, holder, agent, notaire, investor, diaspora, professional, guarantor, co_demandeur) with role-specific scoring weight configurations. Role is determined from user's intent_and project context. Each role has different weight distribution across the 5 scoring dimensions.
extensions.decision_question: Matching role definitions and scoring weights per role

extensions.current_limitation: No search expansion logic in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_ENGINE — Implement 8-level progressive search expansion triggered when insufficient matches found. Expansion order: geographic (neighborhood→city→region→country), budget (±10%→±20%→±30%), property type (exact→family→any), surface (±20%→±40%), bedrooms (±1→±2). Each level has defined score impact. Match pool labeled (primary, expansion_geo, expansion_budget, expansion_type) for transparent display.

expansion_levels.name: Initial search
expansion_levels.action: Full scoring as per original criteria

expansion_levels.name: Property family match
expansion_levels.action: Expand property type to family match

extensions.decision_question: Search expansion rules: priority order and maximum expansion bounds

extensions.current_limitation: No market surveillance mechanism in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: CREATE_NEW_ENGINE — Implement event-driven market surveillance that monitors 8 event types (new property published, availability change, price change, boost activation, verification complete, dossier criteria change, trust level change, new property in same zone). On each event, identify affected dossiers, compute scores, create match records if score >= 60 and competitive. Excellent matches (>= 85) trigger immediate push notification. Batch processing schedule: real-time for publications, 15min for price/availability, 1h for boosts, 24h for full re-evaluation.

notification_thresholds.action: Immediate push notification to demandeur, flag for agent review
Add to match pool, no notification

batch_schedule.scope: New publications, dossier updates, same-zone listings

implementation_notes.phase_assignment: Phase 1 Core Business (EXT-MAT-001 through EXT-MAT-006, EXT-MAT-011: P1) — Phase 2 Operations (EXT-MAT-007 through EXT-MAT-010, EXT-MAT-012, EXT-MAT-013: P2)
implementation_notes.matching_flow_summary: 1. Trigger (new dossier, new property, event) → 2. Apply hard constraints → 3. Score 6 dimensions with weights → 4. Apply boost/penalty rules → 5. Classify compatibility level → 6. Rank (top 10 max) → 7. Propose to demandeur → 8. Double consent workflow → 9. Mise en relation → 10. Visit → 11. Negotiation → 12. Transaction (or rematch on failure)
